title: S&P 500 rejects SpaceX, also blocking entry for OpenAI and Anthropic
author: maltalex
aiHeadline: S&P 500 says 'nope' to SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic, proving that even rocket ships and AI can't escape the clutches of traditional finance's boring rules.

title: Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot
author: speckx
aiHeadline: Meta's AI chatbot becomes the latest tech villain, hacking thousands of Instagram accounts and proving once again that AI is great at being both the solution and the problem.

title: Pentagon raised threat of Israeli spying on U.S. to highest level, sources say
author: MilnerRoute
aiHeadline: Pentagon raises threat level on Israeli spying to 'max,' because nothing says 'trust issues' like accusing your closest ally of espionage, right?

title: GrapheneOS user reported to authorities for using GrapheneOS
author: Cider9986
aiHeadline: GrapheneOS user gets reported to authorities for using GrapheneOS, because apparently, the best way to protect your privacy is to make sure everyone knows you're trying to protect your privacy.

title: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute
author: ramanan
aiHeadline: Google pays SpaceX $920M a month for compute, proving that when you're both in the space and tech game, the only thing more expensive than rocket launches is rocket-sized bills.
